practice.name: Problem 10.4.1 (Mastering AMC 8)
practice.statement: Jeff is climbing a 7 step staircase. If he can climb 1 or 2 steps at a time, in how many ways can he get to the top? 135

practice.name: Problem 10.4.6 (Mastering AMC 8)
practice.statement: Jeff is climbing a 10 step staircase. However, there are spiders on the 3rd and 9th steps, and he refuses to step on those stairs. If he can climb 1 or 2 steps at a time, in how many different ways can he get to the top? Answers 10.2 26 10.4 7 27 10.
